description: Complete the QuickBooks Online integration for Truck Command. The backend services are largely built - this sprint focuses on enabling the UI, adding auto-sync, and completing the user experience.
targetAudience: Owner-operators and small fleets who need seamless QuickBooks sync

stories.title: Enable QuickBooks Connection UI
acceptanceCriteria: Update QuickBooksIntegration.js to show real connection UI instead of 'Coming Soon'
Show 'Connect to QuickBooks' button when not connected
Display company name and connection status when connected
Include 'Disconnect' button with confirmation dialog
Show last sync timestamp if available
Handle loading and error states properly
stories.notes: The backend connection service exists at src/lib/services/quickbooks/quickbooksConnectionService.js. Use existing QuickBooksSyncStatus.js as reference for status display. API routes exist at /api/quickbooks/connect and /api/quickbooks/disconnect.

stories.title: Add Manual Sync Now Button with Progress
acceptanceCriteria: Add 'Sync Now' button to QuickBooksIntegration component when connected
Show real-time progress during sync (e.g., 'Syncing 5 of 12 expenses...')
Display success summary after sync completes (X synced, Y failed)
Show expandable error details if any items failed
Button should be disabled during sync with loading spinner
Call onSyncComplete callback after successful sync
stories.notes: Use the bulkSyncExpenses and bulkSyncInvoices functions from quickbooksSyncService.js. The API route is at /api/quickbooks/sync. Reference QuickBooksBulkSyncModal.js for existing sync UI patterns.

stories.title: Add Category Mapping Configuration UI
acceptanceCriteria: Add 'Configure Mappings' button to QuickBooksIntegration component
Integrate QuickBooksCategoryMappingModal for mapping TC categories to QB accounts
Show count of mapped vs unmapped categories
Alert user if they try to sync with unmapped categories
Fetch QB accounts list from /api/quickbooks/accounts
Save mappings via /api/quickbooks/mappings
stories.notes: QuickBooksCategoryMappingModal.js exists but needs integration into main component. The mapping service is at quickbooksMappingService.js.

stories.title: Implement Auto-Sync on Expense Creation
acceptanceCriteria: Add auto_sync_expenses toggle to QuickBooks connection settings UI
When auto-sync is enabled and user creates/updates an expense, trigger sync automatically
Add sync to expenseService.js create/update functions
Only auto-sync if user has active QB connection with auto_sync_expenses=true
Show toast notification on successful auto-sync
Handle errors gracefully (don't block expense creation if sync fails)
stories.notes: The quickbooks_connections table already has auto_sync_expenses column. Check connection status before triggering. Use the syncExpense function for individual expense sync.

stories.title: Implement Auto-Sync on Invoice Creation
acceptanceCriteria: Add auto_sync_invoices toggle to QuickBooks connection settings UI
When auto-sync is enabled and user creates an invoice, trigger sync automatically
Add sync to invoiceService.js create function
Only auto-sync if user has active QB connection with auto_sync_invoices=true
Show toast notification on successful auto-sync
Handle errors gracefully (don't block invoice creation if sync fails)
stories.notes: Similar pattern to expense auto-sync. The syncInvoice function handles individual invoice sync including customer creation in QB.

stories.title: Add Sync History View
acceptanceCriteria: Add 'View History' button/tab to QuickBooksIntegration component
Display recent sync operations with timestamps
Show status (completed, partial, failed) for each sync
Display records synced and failed counts
Allow expanding failed items to see error messages
Implement 'Retry Failed' button that calls retryFailedSyncs
stories.notes: Use getSyncHistory from quickbooksSyncService.js. The API route /api/quickbooks/status already returns sync stats.

stories.title: Add Sync Status Indicators to Expense/Invoice Lists
acceptanceCriteria: Add QB sync status badge to expense rows (synced, pending, failed, not synced)
Add QB sync status badge to invoice rows
Show 'Sync to QB' quick action for unsynced items
Color code: green for synced, yellow for pending, red for failed, gray for not synced
Clicking badge shows sync details (QB ID, last sync time, error if any)
stories.notes: Use getSyncRecord from quickbooksSyncService to check individual item sync status. Add to ExpenseListItem and InvoiceListItem components.

stories.title: Add Token Refresh Health Check
acceptanceCriteria: Display connection health status in QuickBooksIntegration UI
Show warning if token expires within 7 days
Add 'Refresh Connection' button for users to manually refresh
Auto-refresh token in background when it's close to expiring
Show clear error and 'Reconnect' button if token refresh fails
Display last successful API call timestamp
stories.notes: Token refresh logic exists in quickbooksConnectionService.js. QB refresh tokens expire after 100 days, access tokens after 1 hour. Add health check to verifyConnection function.
